title: City of Cordova Public Works Department is soliciting Request For Proposals (RFP) for surveying services of the17-Mile Landfill
summary: City of Cordova Public Works Department is soliciting Request For Proposals (RFP) for surveying services of the 60.27 acre 17-Mile Landfill, to assist with landfill expansion, modification, and closure planning. title: NIWC Atlantic and Chugach: A Team Driving USCG Modernization at Eastern Defense Summit
summary: Charleston, SC – The powerful partnership between Naval Information Warfare Center (NIWC) Atlantic and Chugach Government Solutions (CGS/Chugach) took center stage during a series of high-profile events leading up to the Eastern Defense Summit (EDS) hosted by the Charleston Defense Contractors Association (CDCA) in December. The collaboration showcased their seamless teamwork in advancing United States Coast Guard (USCG) capabili...

title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: January 23, 2025
summary: January 23, 2025: The Arctic sea ice has continued to increase this week and at a greater rate of 2.78% (as opposed to last week’s increase rate of 1.49%), from the level on 01/16/2025 of 13.119 M km 2 to 13.494 M km 2 for this week. Plot Compiled by: Howard J. Diamond, PhD; Climate Science Program...

title: The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 20 January, 2025
summary: Take Five is The Arctic Institute's weekly redux on the Arctic's most important stories, published every Friday. The post The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 20 January, 2025 appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .

title: YKHC Board of Directors update
summary: The Yukon-Kuskokwim Health Corporation would like to thank Walter Jim for his six years of service as Chairman of the YKHC Board of Directors. Effective Jan. 23, Moses Owen, Vice-Chairman of the Board, will serve as the Interim Chairman of the Board. Mr. Owen is from Akiak and has been on the Board...
